𝗠𝗔𝗜𝗟𝗗𝗥𝗢𝗣 | To provide a simple, self-hostable email service for managing disposable or custom email addresses for various online activities.  🔥 Super Hot!

⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 🐍 Python 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: To provide a simple, self-hostable email service for managing disposable or custom email addresses for various online activities.
📅 Created: Sep 2025 • Updated: Jul 2026

⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Random email generation
✅ Use custom emails
✅ Password protected inboxes
✅ Clean UI
✅ Easy setup
✅ Automatic inbox clearing
✅ Optional email sending


⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐⭐ 651 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 53 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 1 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

Maildrop is a self-hostable email service that allows users to receive emails on any address within their domain. It's designed for managing multiple email addresses easily, signing up for services without using a primary email, and creating multiple website accounts.

⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬

🔗 𝗟𝗜𝗡𝗞𝗦
• 𝗚𝗶𝘁𝗛𝘂𝗯: https://github.com/haileyydev/maildrop

⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬

𝗙𝗔𝗖𝗘_𝗟𝗢𝗢𝗞𝗘𝗥 | Creating engaging and interactive UI elements such as portfolio headers, avatars, or dynamic visual components.  🔥 Super Hot!

✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 🐍 Python 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: Creating engaging and interactive UI elements such as portfolio headers, avatars, or dynamic visual components.
📅 Created: Oct 2025 • Updated: Jul 2026

✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Generate AI-powered face images with varying gaze directions
✅ Create interactive React components that follow cursor movement
✅ Option to use a Replicate model for easy generation
✅ Option to use a Python script for advanced control over generation
✅ Generates a sprite/grid sheet of faces
✅ Provides vanilla HTML, JS, and CSS for effect rendering


✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐⭐ 390 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 32 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 1 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

Face Looker generates AI-powered gaze-tracking face images and provides an interactive React component that makes a face follow the user's cursor in real-time. It offers two methods for image generation: an easy-to-use Replicate model and a more advanced Python script for greater control.

✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱

• 𝗚𝗶𝘁𝗛𝘂𝗯: https://github.com/kylan02/face_looker

𝗔𝗟𝗘𝗫𝗔𝗡𝗗𝗥𝗜𝗘 | Self-hosted knowledge management and team collaboration platform.  🔥 Super Hot!

◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 💻 Vue 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: Self-hosted knowledge management and team collaboration platform.
📅 Created: Aug 2022 • Updated: Jul 2026

◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ One-Command Deployment (Docker)
✅ Advanced Markdown Engine (LaTeX, custom containers, checkboxes, frames, snippets, diagrams)
✅ Granular Organization (Teams, Workspaces, Categories, nested Documents)
✅ Offline-First PWA with seamless synchronization
✅ OpenID Connect (OIDC) SSO
✅ Automated backup/restore pipelines
✅ Speech-to-Text dictation
✅ Snippet Manager
✅ 5-Level Access Model
✅ Command Center (Ctrl+K) for navigation and actions
✅ Full-Text Indexing
✅ Integrated Kanban boards
✅ S3 Integration for storage


◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐⭐⭐ 2K 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 124 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 17 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

Alexandrie is an open-source, self-hosted knowledge base and wiki platform that serves as an alternative to tools like Notion and Confluence. It offers advanced Markdown editing, offline-first capabilities, team collaboration features, and robust security options like OIDC/SSO.

◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈
